title: An Ordinance enacting the Supplemental Budget for the Year 2024 in the amount of Four Million Pesos and 00/100 (Php 4,000,000.00) chargeable against the previous year's Financial Assistance from the Laguna Provincial Community Development Program released to the Municipal Government of Los Baños for the construction/rehabilitation/improvement of walkways and bike lanes along the major thoroughfares of the town
